languages.text: "Вы не понимаете, все вокруг — лишь иллюзия, плен временной петли".

traits.locale_text: "Вы не понимаете, все вокруг — лишь иллюзия, плен временной петли".

languages.text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."
languages.original_text: "Вы не понимаете, все вокруг — лишь иллюзия, плен временной петли".

traits.locale_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."
"You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."
"You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

languages.text: “你还没明白，你眼前的一切不过是幻象——你被困在时间循环里了。”
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: “你还没明白，你眼前的一切不过是幻象——你被困在时间循环里了。”

languages.text: « Vous ne comprenez pas. Tout ce que vous voyez n'est qu'une illusion. Vous êtes prisonnière d'une boucle temporelle. »
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne comprenez pas. Tout ce que vous voyez n'est qu'une illusion. Vous êtes prisonnière d'une boucle temporelle. »

languages.text: "Bak, dinle beni. Gördüğün her şey illüzyondan ibaret. Bir zaman döngüsüne hapsoldun."
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Bak, dinle beni. Gördüğün her şey illüzyondan ibaret. Bir zaman döngüsüne hapsoldun."

languages.text: «No lo entiende: todo lo que está viendo es una ilusión. Está atrapada en un bucle temporal».
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: «No lo entiende: todo lo que está viendo es una ilusión. Está atrapada en un bucle temporal».

languages.text: "Ihr versteht nicht ... alles, was Ihr seht, ist eine Illusion. Ihr seid in einer Zeitschleife gefangen."
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr versteht nicht ... alles, was Ihr seht, ist eine Illusion. Ihr seid in einer Zeitschleife gefangen."

languages.text: 「あなたは理解できないだろう。あなたが見ているものはすべて幻影だ。あなたは時間ループに囚われている。」
languages.original_text: "You do not understand — everything you see is just an illusion. You are imprisoned in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは理解できないだろう。あなたが見ているものはすべて幻影だ。あなたは時間ループに囚われている。」
